Funnel #5: The Download
ABOUT THIS FUNNEL
Ideal for Facebook marketers that have garnered results for a client (no testimonials or case studies required).
Feel free to edit to suit for any vertical or niche.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

IMPORTANT:
This funnel uses the SAME backend as all other funnels (calendar, form, thank you page) - if you don't have this set up yet, refer to The Audit Funnel for the Backend funnel download.
What You'll Need
Landing Page (we use ClickFunnels in this example)
Screenshot of results (or a 10" video is even better!)
Funnel template for the niche in question (feel free to use the one in the Academy)
Short training video taking them through the funnel (we use a tool like Screenflow to record ours)
Email sequence
Ads
Important Links
Download the full funnel into your ClickFunnels account
https://app.clickfunnels.com/funnels/4332760/share/aouav57akvycg6ec
Access screenshots and imagery
https://www.dropbox.com/sh/typ7sa2y20xyu1f/AAAz9-9KfDAor7x-WzYijA2ia?dl=0
Landing Page Links
Opt-In Page: 	https://catherine143.clickfunnels.com/coaches-funnel-download15246998
Thank You Page: 	https://catherine143.clickfunnels.com/thanks15246999
Content Page: 	https://catherine143.clickfunnels.com/coaches15247000
Step by Step
Step #1: Download funnel to Click Funnels (or set up your own)
Set up custom domains (optional)
Step #2: 	Set up pixel & tracking
Add base pixel to each page of your funnel
Add ‘Complete Registration’ to thank you page
Add ‘ViewedOptIn’ custom event to opt-in page
Open up both all pages in a new tab to check events and trigger the events
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 3 --

Under the Customer Conversion tab – create customer conversions for both ‘ViewedOptin’
Step #3: Create email list
Create a list of opt-ins
Create automated messages for Opt-In list - make sure first message has a link to the Training Page in the funnel
Create email automation (when someone is subscribed to the Booked Call list they are unsubscribed to the Opt-In list)
Step #4: Integrate your funnel with your email list
Integrate opt-in page with email list
Step #5: Create Your Custom Audiences
CA #1: Visited Landing Page last 180 Days
CA #2: Opted In (Completed Registrations) – last 180 Days
CA #3: Booked Call – last 180 Days
CA #4: Completed Registrations - last 10 days (optional: for retargeting)
Step #6: Create Your Training Materials
Create a client funnel template (use LucidChart) and add to Dropbox
Create 5 min walk through of funnel (keep it very high level) - upload to Wistia or Vimeo and embed on your Training Page
Take a screenshot of results - blur out private/confidential details and upload to Opt-in page
Step #7: Create Facebook Ad
Conversion objective campaign – exclude CA #1, CA #2, CA #3
Try and lead with storytelling with the ad creative
Step #9: Go Live!!!!
support@cathowell.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
